root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น
root.sql:
SELECT SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO ,(SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.prename || sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname) AS membername ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.BEGIN_BALANCE ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.PRINCIPAL_BALANCE ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.INTEREST_ARREAR ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.ID_CARD ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.FIXED_INTEREST_RATE ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.LOAN_CODE_DESC ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.APPROVE_DATE, 'dd/mm/yyyy') AS APPROVE_DATE ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NAME ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LAST_PERIOD ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.PERIOD_PAYMENT_AMOUNT ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.DROP_PAYMENT_STATUS ,SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.FIXED_PAYMENT ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') AS resignation_approve_date ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.group_section ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.entry_date, 'dd/mm/yyyy') AS entry_date ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_ref ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ,DECODE(SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.drop_payment_status, '0', 'ปกติ', '1', 'งดทั้งหมด', '2', 'งดต้น', 'งดดอก') AS drop_payment_status_name ,DECODE(SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.loan_payment_type_code, '01', 'คงต้น', 'คงยอด') AS loan_payment_type_name FROM SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code ,SC_LON_M_CONTRACT ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.PRENAME_CODE = SC_MEM_M_UCF_PRENAME.PRENAME_CODE) AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LOAN_CODE = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.LOAN_CODE) AND (SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO = SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO) AND (SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBER_GROUP_NO = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.MEMBER_GROUP_NO) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no --and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock <=0 AND ( (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.MEMBERSHIP_NO = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.contact_status = '1') AND (SC_LON_M_LOAN_CARD.principal_balance > 0) )
ORDER BY SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.MEMBERSHIP_NO ASC
